input.title: Payment authorization
input.requirement: As a shopper, I want card payments to be authorized before an order is placed so that failed payments do not create paid orders.
input.acceptance_criteria: Successful authorizations create an order. Declined cards show an error. Duplicate authorization retries do not double charge.
input.api_notes: POST /api/payments/authorize with cartId, paymentMethodId, and billingAddress. Returns authorizationId and orderId.
